steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says Miyazaki presents fantasy elements 'with little backstory or explanation.' The blank must describe what he does with details and exposition in a way that matches that constraint — he refuses to provide them.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'celebrate': to honor or praise enthusiastically. If Miyazaki celebrated details and exposition, he would highlight them — the opposite of giving little backstory. ✗
  • Choice B — 'combine': to merge together. This implies he includes those details by blending them in, not that he omits them. ✗
  • Choice C — 'invent': to create something new. Inventing details and exposition means adding them, not withholding them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'withhold': to refuse to give or provide. 'He tends to withhold details and exposition' aligns directly with 'little backstory or explanation.' ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
